fact_nuggets.text: Solid Rock (Japanese: Hard Rock) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Reduces the damage that the Pokemon suffers from super-effective attacks. B S L Conq. Reduces damage from supereffective attacks. MD GtI Reduces damage received from supereffective moves. * The Pokemon takes less damage from supereffective moves. * S MD MD RT DX The Pokemon takes less damage from supereffective moves.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2 damage will do 1.5 damage instead. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2 damage will do 1.5 damage instead.
Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
